feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.task_description: Add --delegate flag to nf:quick for full task delegation via Mode C dispatch
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.approach: Add a --delegate {slot-name} flag to the /nf:quick workflow that bypasses local planning and dispatches the entire task to a named external agent CLI slot via Mode C, with the orchestrator handling dispatch, result tracking, and recording.
out_of_scope: Modifying quorum slot worker implementations or agent CLI behaviors
Creating new agent CLI providers or slot definitions
Fallback or retry logic when delegated execution fails
Q-learning routing or automatic slot selection
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.risk_reason: Changes to core workflow files (core/workflows/quick.md) that add new --delegate flag with Mode C dispatch integration
